{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Leovio Concepts is an energy support company based in Lagos, Nigeria, delivering high-quality diesel supply to businesses reliant on generator-powered operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Executive

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Description


	We are seeking a Marketing Executive to develop sales and marketing strategies in our organization.&nbsp;
	The role of the sales and marketing executive is to drive sales by designing and implementing targeted marketing strategies.
	And also be responsible for tracking sales data and creating performance reports.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintaining client relations
	Support lead generation campaigns and promotional activities
	Available for outdoor marketing and meetings with client(s)
	Answering client queries about product specification and uses
	Tracking sales data to ensure the company meets sales quotas
	Creating and presenting a sales performance report
	Contributing to the development and marketing strategies
	Market research and client budget management
	Recommend improvements based on marketing insights and analytics


Requirements
Technical Skills:


	Proven work experience as a marketing executive
	Familiar with digital marketing tools and platforms
	Proficient in MS Office, Google Suite
	High-level communication and project management skills


Added advantage:


	Strong skills in Meta Ads Manager, Canva, and Social Media (Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)


Salary
N120,000 to N200,000.00 / Month.",

Sales & Marketing Executive Job at Leovio Concepts




        
    

        
        Leovio Concepts is an energy support company based in Lagos, Nigeria, delivering high-quality diesel supply to businesses reliant on generator-powered operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Marketing Executive

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a Marketing Executive to develop sales and marketing strategies in our organization. 
	The role of the sales and marketing executive is to drive sales by designing and implementing targeted marketing strategies.
	And also be responsible for tracking sales data and creating performance reports.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintaining client relations
	Support lead generation campaigns and promotional activities
	Available for outdoor marketing and meetings with client(s)
	Answering client queries about product specification and uses
	Tracking sales data to ensure the company meets sales quotas
	Creating and presenting a sales performance report
	Contributing to the development and marketing strategies
	Market research and client budget management
	Recommend improvements based on marketing insights and analytics


Requirements
Technical Skills:


	Proven work experience as a marketing executive
	Familiar with digital marketing tools and platforms
	Proficient in MS Office, Google Suite
	High-level communication and project management skills


Added advantage:


	Strong skills in Meta Ads Manager, Canva, and Social Media (Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)


Salary
N120,000 to N200,000.00 / Month.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Visual Content Creator",
  "description": "LiDA Digital is a growth-focused branding and marketing agency that works with businesses to turn their brand into a measurable business asset. We specialize in brand strategy, visual identity, digital marketing, content production, and advertising, helping companies move from visibility to real results.

Our clients span industries such as real estate, corporate services, and emerging startups, where we support positioning, customer acquisition, and long-term brand growth. At LiDA, we focus on clarity, execution, and performance ensuring that every creative output aligns with business objectives. We&rsquo;re a fast-growing, execution-driven team that values creativity, ownership, and high standards, offering opportunities to work on impactful projects and build brands at scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Visual Content Creator
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	This role is ideal for someone who is skilled in videography and video editing, with graphic design experience as an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


	Capture high-quality video content for client projects and agency campaigns
	Edit videos for social media, ads, and promotional materials
	Create engaging visual content aligned with brand guidelines
	Collaborate with the strategy and content teams to bring concepts to life


Requirements


	Proven experience in videography and video editing
	Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or similar software
	Strong storytelling and visual composition skills
	Graphic design skills usingAdobe Photoshop, or Illustrator are an advantage
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.


Salary
N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@lidadigital.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Visual Content Creator Job at LiDA Digital Agency




        
    

        
        LiDA Digital is a growth-focused branding and marketing agency that works with businesses to turn their brand into a measurable business asset. We specialize in brand strategy, visual identity, digital marketing, content production, and advertising, helping companies move from visibility to real results.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our clients span industries such as real estate, corporate services, and emerging startups, where we support positioning, customer acquisition, and long-term brand growth. At LiDA, we focus on clarity, execution, and performance ensuring that every creative output aligns with business objectives. We’re a fast-growing, execution-driven team that values creativity, ownership, and high standards, offering opportunities to work on impactful projects and build brands at scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Visual Content Creator
Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Summary 


	This role is ideal for someone who is skilled in videography and video editing, with graphic design experience as an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


	Capture high-quality video content for client projects and agency campaigns
	Edit videos for social media, ads, and promotional materials
	Create engaging visual content aligned with brand guidelines
	Collaborate with the strategy and content teams to bring concepts to life


Requirements


	Proven experience in videography and video editing
	Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or similar software
	Strong storytelling and visual composition skills
	Graphic design skills usingAdobe Photoshop, or Illustrator are an advantage
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.


Salary
N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Control Manager",
  "description": "Fastizers Food and Confectionery Limited is our story and it is one of passion, hard work, and creativity and right partnerships. We can proudly say we are one of Nigeria&rsquo;s fastest growing indigenous FMCG companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Manager

Job Location: Agbara, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Quality Control Manager is responsible for planning and coordinating quality control activities to ensure that all products meet established standards, regulatory requirements, and customer expectations.
	The role involves overseeing laboratory operations, monitoring production processes, and driving continuous improvement initiatives.
	The manager must independently handle audits such as NAFDAC, SON, HACCP, ISO 22000, and other relevant standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement quality systems:Develop, implement, and maintain Quality Control policies, procedures, and standards by enforcing quality control procedures and standards for all stages of production, including preparation, baking, and packaging
	Support continuous improvement and risk management initiatives. Any other responsibilities or assignments as instructed by management.
	Ensure product compliance:Monitor production processes and raw materials /packaging materials to ensure they meet safety, regulatory, and internal quality standards. Conduct daily routine analysis of raw water, treated water, and finished products.
	Prepare quality reports and present findings to management regularly.
	Testing and analysis:Oversee laboratory testing, analyze results, and take corrective action when necessary. This includes testing for characteristics like taste, flavor, pH, and moisture, as well as monitoring laboratory equipment performance.
	Review and approve test results, Certificates of Analysis (COA), and batch records. Monitor Critical Control Points (CCPs) and process parameters.
	Manage calibration and maintenance of laboratory equipment.
	Team leadership:Coach, mentor, train, and supervise the quality control team to ensure effective performance and adherence to quality standards.
	Supervise daily QC laboratory operations and staff performance.
	Regular training and mentoring of QC personnel on testing procedures and GMP /GHK requirements
	Enforce hygiene, sanitation, and Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP)/Good Housekeeping Practices (GHK).
	Documentation and reporting:Maintain accurate records of all quality control activities, including test results, compliance certificates (e.g., Certificate of Analysis), and audit findings. Submit reports to management regularly.
	Continuous improvement:Drive initiatives to improve production processes, reduce waste, and enhance the overall quality of the products produced.
	Audit coordination:Participate in internal audits and assist the QAM with external audits by regulatory bodies or certifying agencies.
	Customer and supplier liaison:Address customer complaints and work with suppliers/vendors to ensure the quality and compliance of incoming raw materials/packaging materials.
	Investigate product complaints, non-conformities, and deviations using Root Cause Failure Analysis (RCFA).


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Biochemistry, Chemistry, Microbiology, Food Science, or related field.
	Minimum of 5&ndash;10 years of experience in Quality Control in food processing/beverages or FMCG industries.
	Strong knowledge of ISO 9001, ISO 22000 / FSMS, HACCP, and GMP/GHK principles.
	Familiarity with laboratory testing methods, microbiology and quality tools (5 WHY, CAPA, SPC, etc.).
	Excellent leadership, communication, and analytical skills.
	Must reside around Agbara-Lusada axis or its environs.


Key Competencies:


	Attention to detail
	Problem-solving abilities
	Team leadership &amp; team mentoring
	Quality risk assessment &amp; reporting
	Documentation and reporting as per company requirements
	Process optimization &amp; implementation
	Knowledge of compliance regulations related to local &amp;statutory bodies


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 per month.",

Quality Control Manager Job at Fastizers Food and Confectionery Limited




        
    

        
        Fastizers Food and Confectionery Limited is our story and it is one of passion, hard work, and creativity and right partnerships. We can proudly say we are one of Nigeria’s fastest growing indigenous FMCG companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Manager

Job Location: Agbara, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Quality Control Manager is responsible for planning and coordinating quality control activities to ensure that all products meet established standards, regulatory requirements, and customer expectations.
	The role involves overseeing laboratory operations, monitoring production processes, and driving continuous improvement initiatives.
	The manager must independently handle audits such as NAFDAC, SON, HACCP, ISO 22000, and other relevant standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement quality systems:Develop, implement, and maintain Quality Control policies, procedures, and standards by enforcing quality control procedures and standards for all stages of production, including preparation, baking, and packaging
	Support continuous improvement and risk management initiatives. Any other responsibilities or assignments as instructed by management.
	Ensure product compliance:Monitor production processes and raw materials /packaging materials to ensure they meet safety, regulatory, and internal quality standards. Conduct daily routine analysis of raw water, treated water, and finished products.
	Prepare quality reports and present findings to management regularly.
	Testing and analysis:Oversee laboratory testing, analyze results, and take corrective action when necessary. This includes testing for characteristics like taste, flavor, pH, and moisture, as well as monitoring laboratory equipment performance.
	Review and approve test results, Certificates of Analysis (COA), and batch records. Monitor Critical Control Points (CCPs) and process parameters.
	Manage calibration and maintenance of laboratory equipment.
	Team leadership:Coach, mentor, train, and supervise the quality control team to ensure effective performance and adherence to quality standards.
	Supervise daily QC laboratory operations and staff performance.
	Regular training and mentoring of QC personnel on testing procedures and GMP /GHK requirements
	Enforce hygiene, sanitation, and Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP)/Good Housekeeping Practices (GHK).
	Documentation and reporting:Maintain accurate records of all quality control activities, including test results, compliance certificates (e.g., Certificate of Analysis), and audit findings. Submit reports to management regularly.
	Continuous improvement:Drive initiatives to improve production processes, reduce waste, and enhance the overall quality of the products produced.
	Audit coordination:Participate in internal audits and assist the QAM with external audits by regulatory bodies or certifying agencies.
	Customer and supplier liaison:Address customer complaints and work with suppliers/vendors to ensure the quality and compliance of incoming raw materials/packaging materials.
	Investigate product complaints, non-conformities, and deviations using Root Cause Failure Analysis (RCFA).


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Biochemistry, Chemistry, Microbiology, Food Science, or related field.
	Minimum of 5–10 years of experience in Quality Control in food processing/beverages or FMCG industries.
	Strong knowledge of ISO 9001, ISO 22000 / FSMS, HACCP, and GMP/GHK principles.
	Familiarity with laboratory testing methods, microbiology and quality tools (5 WHY, CAPA, SPC, etc.).
	Excellent leadership, communication, and analytical skills.
	Must reside around Agbara-Lusada axis or its environs.


Key Competencies:


	Attention to detail
	Problem-solving abilities
	Team leadership & team mentoring
	Quality risk assessment & reporting
	Documentation and reporting as per company requirements
	Process optimization & implementation
	Knowledge of compliance regulations related to local &statutory bodies


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 per month.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Facility Manager",
  "description": "Clinton Oilfield Limited - We provide technical depth, reliable service, and fit-for-purpose solutions that help operators meet complex drilling and production targets while ensuring safety, compliance, and cost efficiency. Together, we help operators deliver projects faster and with greater confidence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Role Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and technically skilled Facility Managerto oversee the maintenance, functionality, safety, and overall management of the company&rsquo;s facilities and operational assets.
	The successful candidate will ensure that all facilities, utilities, equipment, and support services operate efficiently to support business continuity.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day management and maintenance of company facilities across all locations
	Supervise maintenance activities for electrical systems, generators, HVAC/air conditioning systems, plumbing, water systems, and other building infrastructure
	Coordinate preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Manage facility service providers and contractors to ensure quality delivery
	Monitor fuel consumption, utility usage, and maintenance costs
	Oversee facility-related assets, including office equipment and operational support infrastructure
	Ensure proper functioning and upkeep of company vehicles and support coordination of repairs where required
	Manage safety inspections and ensure compliance with HSE and statutory requirements
	Respond promptly to facility emergencies and operational issues
	Prepare facility reports, maintenance plans, and budget recommendations


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Building Technology, Facility Management, or a related field
	Minimum of 5&ndash;8 years of relevant experiencein facility management, technical maintenance, or operations management
	Hands-on experience managing generators, electrical systems, HVAC systems, and general facility operations
	Strong vendor and contractor management experience
	Good understanding of preventive maintenance practices and operational planning
	Strong problem-solving and leadership skills
	Professional certifications in Facility Management, Engineering, HSE, or related areas will be an added advantage


Preferred Candidate Profile:


	Strong technical troubleshooting capability
	Excellent organizational and reporting skills
	Ability to manage multiple sites and priorities effectively
	High level of accountability and ownership
	Experience managing facilities in corporate, industrial, warehouse, logistics, or oil &amp; gas environments is an advantage.

Facility Manager Job at Clinton Oilfield Limited




        
    

        
        Clinton Oilfield Limited - We provide technical depth, reliable service, and fit-for-purpose solutions that help operators meet complex drilling and production targets while ensuring safety, compliance, and cost efficiency. Together, we help operators deliver projects faster and with greater confidence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and technically skilled Facility Managerto oversee the maintenance, functionality, safety, and overall management of the company’s facilities and operational assets.
	The successful candidate will ensure that all facilities, utilities, equipment, and support services operate efficiently to support business continuity.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day management and maintenance of company facilities across all locations
	Supervise maintenance activities for electrical systems, generators, HVAC/air conditioning systems, plumbing, water systems, and other building infrastructure
	Coordinate preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Manage facility service providers and contractors to ensure quality delivery
	Monitor fuel consumption, utility usage, and maintenance costs
	Oversee facility-related assets, including office equipment and operational support infrastructure
	Ensure proper functioning and upkeep of company vehicles and support coordination of repairs where required
	Manage safety inspections and ensure compliance with HSE and statutory requirements
	Respond promptly to facility emergencies and operational issues
	Prepare facility reports, maintenance plans, and budget recommendations


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Building Technology, Facility Management, or a related field
	Minimum of 5–8 years of relevant experiencein facility management, technical maintenance, or operations management
	Hands-on experience managing generators, electrical systems, HVAC systems, and general facility operations
	Strong vendor and contractor management experience
	Good understanding of preventive maintenance practices and operational planning
	Strong problem-solving and leadership skills
	Professional certifications in Facility Management, Engineering, HSE, or related areas will be an added advantage


Preferred Candidate Profile:


	Strong technical troubleshooting capability
	Excellent organizational and reporting skills
	Ability to manage multiple sites and priorities effectively
	High level of accountability and ownership
	Experience managing facilities in corporate, industrial, warehouse, logistics, or oil & gas environments is an advantage.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Assistant",
  "description": "Uncle John &amp; Suur Cleaning is a cleaning management company that provides and outsource cleaners on behalf of companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Sanitation
	Trash Management
	Restroom care
	Inventory control
	Minimal errands routine and other duties as assigned by the management.
